name: Chocolate Turele Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (8 oz each) cream cheese - softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Crush vanilla wafers into fine crumbs and set aside.
3. Melt margarine until smooth, then mix in caramels, evaporated milk, pecans, cream cheese, sugar, and vanilla.
4. Fold in melted chocolate pieces.
5. Pour mixture into a greased springform pan.
6. Bake for 1 hour or until center is almost set.
7. Let cool completely before removing from pan.
8. Turn off oven when ready to serve.
